== Notes for [[Item:Q105687|Q105687]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al_Sahba%27bint_Rabi%27ah

Souce 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Ali

Source 3: http://www.balaghah.net/books/imam_ali/body_family_of_i1.html

Source 4: http://www.janathimessage.co.uk/AskTheImam/askimama.asp?qno=465

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000008717637168

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
